chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3098 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.14730/2023. 2. For hearing of main case. 14.01.2025 Mr. Aitzaz Manzoor Memon, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Tahir Khalil Dogar, advocate holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Sara Malkani, Assistant Attorney General. Under instructions, learned counsel submits that the petition has become infructuous and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
